Home / Services / Garage Door Opener Repair

Garage Door Opener Repair

Expert repair and replacement of all major garage door opener brands.

A malfunctioning garage door opener can be a major inconvenience, especially during Charlotte's frequent thunderstorms or when you're rushing to work. Total Garage Works provides comprehensive garage door opener repair services, handling everything from minor adjustments to complete replacements. We service all major brands, including Chamberlain, LiftMaster, Genie, and more. Our technicians are skilled at diagnosing a wide range of opener problems, such as remote control issues, motor failures, and sensor malfunctions. We'll troubleshoot the problem efficiently and provide you with a clear explanation of the necessary repairs. If a replacement is required, we offer a wide selection of high-quality openers with advanced features like smartphone control and battery backup. Living in an older home in Myers Park or a newer build in South Charlotte? We've seen it all. Trust us to get your garage door opener working reliably again.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Thorough inspection of the opener unit, remote controls, and safety sensors.
  2. 02 Step 2: Diagnosis of the problem and explanation of repair options.
  3. 03 Step 3: Repair or replacement of faulty components using quality parts.
  4. 04 Step 4: Testing and adjustment of the opener to ensure smooth and safe operation.

Benefits

  • Restored convenience and security
  • Extended lifespan of your garage door opener
  • Improved safety and reliability
  • Access to advanced opener features

Frequently Asked Questions

My garage door opener is making a loud grinding noise. What could it be?

Grinding noises often indicate a problem with the motor or gears. It's best to have a technician inspect the opener to determine the cause and prevent further damage.

Why isn't my remote control working?

Remote control issues can be caused by dead batteries, a faulty remote, or a problem with the opener's receiver. We can diagnose and repair or replace the remote as needed.

How often should I have my garage door opener serviced?

We recommend having your garage door opener serviced annually to ensure it's operating safely and efficiently. Regular maintenance can prevent costly repairs down the road.

Get a Free Estimate
